news.title:
Gold rally reshapes investor behavior; ETFs, SGBs gain traction.
Titan outperforms jewellery stocks; Kalyan & PC Jeweller face volatility.
news.summary:
Gold rally reshapes investor behavior; ETFs, SGBs gain traction.
Titan outperforms jewellery stocks; Kalyan & PC Jeweller face volatility.

news.title:
Five jewellery firms, including Lalithaa Jewellery, delay IPOs worth ₹3,840 crore due to bearish market conditions.
Experts see strong fundamentals in jewellery sector; Titan, Kalyan Jewellers report healthy earnings despite market volatility.
news.summary:
Five jewellery firms, including Lalithaa Jewellery, delay IPOs worth ₹3,840 crore due to bearish market conditions.
Experts see strong fundamentals in jewellery sector; Titan, Kalyan Jewellers report healthy earnings despite market volatility.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal maintains Buy on Kalyan Jewellers, targeting Rs 550, a 33% upside, post strong Q4FY26 update.
Kalyan reported 64% YoY sales growth in Q4FY26; FY26 revenue grew 42%, with robust store additions despite geopolitical challenges.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal maintains Buy on Kalyan Jewellers, targeting Rs 550, a 33% upside, post strong Q4FY26 update.
Kalyan reported 64% YoY sales growth in Q4FY26; FY26 revenue grew 42%, with robust store additions despite geopolitical challenges.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Kalyan Jewellers' credit ratings: ICRA AA (Stable) & ICRA A1.
Ratings pertain to the company's bank facilities; rationale available on ICRA's website.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Kalyan Jewellers' credit ratings: ICRA AA (Stable) & ICRA A1.
Ratings pertain to the company's bank facilities; rationale available on ICRA's website.

news.title:
Nifty Consumer Durables index surged 4.48% as RBI maintained repo rate at 5.25%. Gains led by Kajaria Ceramics, PG Electroplast.
Amber Enterprises, Blue Star, Dixon, Kalyan Jewellers, and Bata India also rose over 4%. Stable rates boost consumer demand optimism.
news.summary:
Nifty Consumer Durables index surged 4.48% as RBI maintained repo rate at 5.25%. Gains led by Kajaria Ceramics, PG Electroplast.
Amber Enterprises, Blue Star, Dixon, Kalyan Jewellers, and Bata India also rose over 4%. Stable rates boost consumer demand optimism.

news.title:
Axis Capital reiterates Buy on Kalyan Jewellers with a TP of Rs 660.
Positive Q4FY26 results and sustained momentum drive this recommendation.
news.summary:
Axis Capital reiterates Buy on Kalyan Jewellers with a TP of Rs 660.
Positive Q4FY26 results and sustained momentum drive this recommendation.

news.title:
PC Jeweller shares surged 9.5%, trading at ₹8.60 post strong Q4 updates.
Kalyan Jewellers gained on robust growth outlook amid sustained jewellery demand.
news.summary:
PC Jeweller shares surged 9.5%, trading at ₹8.60 post strong Q4 updates.
Kalyan Jewellers gained on robust growth outlook amid sustained jewellery demand.

news.title: Kalyan Jewellers shares gained nearly 2% post Q4 results.
news.summary: Kalyan Jewellers shares gained nearly 2% post Q4 results.

news.title:
Kalyan Jewellers' Q4 FY26 revenue rose 64% YoY; FY26 growth 42%.
India ops grew 65% in Q4 and 43% FY; Candere surged 360% in Q4.
news.summary:
Kalyan Jewellers' Q4 FY26 revenue rose 64% YoY; FY26 growth 42%.
India ops grew 65% in Q4 and 43% FY; Candere surged 360% in Q4.

news.title:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.
news.summary:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.

news.title:
Senco Gold and Kalyan Jewellers surged 15% and 6% after govt reduced gold, silver import prices.
Lower costs improve jewellers' margins; easing geopolitical tensions boost bullion, aiding sector outlook.
news.summary:
Senco Gold and Kalyan Jewellers surged 15% and 6% after govt reduced gold, silver import prices.
Lower costs improve jewellers' margins; easing geopolitical tensions boost bullion, aiding sector outlook.

news.title:
Sensex gained 185 points to close at 73,319.55; Nifty 50 rebounded to 22,713.10, up 0.15%.
Sumeet Bagadia recommends buying Infosys, Kalyan Jewellers, Supriya Lifescience, MM Forgings, and Vedanta.
news.summary:
Sensex gained 185 points to close at 73,319.55; Nifty 50 rebounded to 22,713.10, up 0.15%.
Sumeet Bagadia recommends buying Infosys, Kalyan Jewellers, Supriya Lifescience, MM Forgings, and Vedanta.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.

news.title:
MOSL gives Kalyan Jewellers a 'Buy' rating with Rs 550 TP, citing strong India demand.
Key drivers include store expansion, Candere growth, EBITDA improvement, despite MENA geopolitical risks.
news.summary:
MOSL gives Kalyan Jewellers a 'Buy' rating with Rs 550 TP, citing strong India demand.
Key drivers include store expansion, Candere growth, EBITDA improvement, despite MENA geopolitical risks.

news.title:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.
news.summary:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.

news.title: Kalyan Jewellers generates 12% of revenue from West Asia.
news.summary: Kalyan Jewellers generates 12% of revenue from West Asia.

news.title:
Indian stocks like L&T, Kalyan Jewellers, KEC International, and Welspun Corp have substantial Middle East exposure.
Projects include desalination, infrastructure, and transmission, with L&T's 49% intl orders, KEC's Q4 bids, and Welspun's $1.7k cr capex.
news.summary:
Indian stocks like L&T, Kalyan Jewellers, KEC International, and Welspun Corp have substantial Middle East exposure.
Projects include desalination, infrastructure, and transmission, with L&T's 49% intl orders, KEC's Q4 bids, and Welspun's $1.7k cr capex.

news.title:
Titan posted 40% YoY revenue growth in Q3, driven by 32% like-to-like growth. Kalyan Jewellers saw 42% YoY growth, supported by 27% same-store sales growth.
Despite gold price volatility, demand remained strong into Jan 2026. Jewellery led consumer discretionary growth, aided by festive season and higher-ticket purchases.
news.summary:
Titan posted 40% YoY revenue growth in Q3, driven by 32% like-to-like growth. Kalyan Jewellers saw 42% YoY growth, supported by 27% same-store sales growth.
Despite gold price volatility, demand remained strong into Jan 2026. Jewellery led consumer discretionary growth, aided by festive season and higher-ticket purchases.

news.title: Kalyan Jewellers promoter acquired 4.65 lakh shares, total since Feb 9 is 9.25 lakh.
news.summary: Kalyan Jewellers promoter acquired 4.65 lakh shares, total since Feb 9 is 9.25 lakh.

news.title:
Kalyan Jewellers alerts SEBI about alleged market manipulation concerns.
The company seeks suspension from the Futures and Options (F&O) segment.
news.summary:
Kalyan Jewellers alerts SEBI about alleged market manipulation concerns.
The company seeks suspension from the Futures and Options (F&O) segment.
